title: [FIRRTL] Incorrect Output Directory for Multiply Instantiate Module in Layer
body:
I'm seeing what I think is incorrect behavior for output directories for the following circuit:

``` firrtl
FIRRTL version 4.0.0
circuit Foo: %[[
  {
    "class": "firrtl.transforms.DontTouchAnnotation",
    "target": "~Foo|Bar>b"
  },
  {
    "class": "firrtl.transforms.DontTouchAnnotation",
    "target": "~Foo|Baz>b"
  },
  {
    "class": "sifive.enterprise.firrtl.TestBenchDirAnnotation",
    "dirname": "verification/testbench"
  },
  {
    "class": "sifive.enterprise.firrtl.MarkDUTAnnotation",
    "target": "~Foo|Bar"
  }
]]
  layer A, bind, "verification/testbench":

  module Baz:
    wire b: UInt<1>
    invalidate b

  module Bar:
    wire b: UInt<1>
    invalidate b

    layerblock A:
      inst baz_0 of Baz
      inst baz_1 of Baz

  public module Foo:

    inst bar of Bar
```

What I am seeing is the following:

```
# rm -rf design && firtool TestBenchDirAnnotation.fir -o design -split-verilog && tree design
design
├── Bar.sv
├── filelist.f
└── verification
    ├── Baz.sv
    └── testbench
        ├── Bar_A.sv
        ├── Foo.sv
        └── layers_Foo_A.sv
```

It is unexpected that `Baz.sv` is located under `design/verification/`. It is expected that this should be under `design/verification/testbench/`.

Interestingly, if I instead _singly-instantiate_ Baz, I get the right output:

``` firrtl
FIRRTL version 4.0.0
circuit Foo: %[[
  {
    "class": "firrtl.transforms.DontTouchAnnotation",
    "target": "~Foo|Bar>b"
  },
  {
    "class": "firrtl.transforms.DontTouchAnnotation",
    "target": "~Foo|Baz>b"
  },
  {
    "class": "sifive.enterprise.firrtl.TestBenchDirAnnotation",
    "dirname": "verification/testbench"
  },
  {
    "class": "sifive.enterprise.firrtl.MarkDUTAnnotation",
    "target": "~Foo|Bar"
  }
]]
  layer A, bind, "verification/testbench":

  module Baz:
    wire b: UInt<1>
    invalidate b

  module Bar:
    wire b: UInt<1>
    invalidate b

    layerblock A:
      inst baz_0 of Baz

  public module Foo:

    inst bar of Bar
```

When compiled, produces:

```
# rm -rf design && firtool TestBenchDirAnnotation.fir -o design -split-verilog && tree design
design
├── Bar.sv
├── filelist.f
└── verification
    └── testbench
        ├── Bar_A.sv
        ├── Baz.sv
        ├── Foo.sv
        └── layers_Foo_A.sv
```
